hero.subtitle: Join AJ Language School and build the confidence to communicate in English — wherever life takes you.

about.title: About AJ Language School
about.p1: AJ Language School is dedicated to helping students improve their English communication skills through practical, engaging, and supportive lessons.
about.p3: The school's approach focuses on building confidence, improving real-life communication, and helping students feel comfortable expressing themselves in English — in a positive, motivating, and results-driven environment.

programs.title: Our Programs
programs.subtitle: Comprehensive English programs designed for every goal and level

general.name: General English
general.desc: Group classes for Basic, Intermediate, and Advanced levels. Each session focuses on building confidence, improving communication, and helping students feel comfortable speaking English in real-life situations.

academic.name: English for Academic Purposes
academic.desc: TOEFL iBT and IELTS exam preparation. Develop the academic English skills needed for success, including reading, writing, listening, and speaking.

professional.name: English for Professionals
professional.desc: Specialized English training for professionals who want to improve their communication skills in specific industries for career growth.

talking.name: The Talking Club
talking.desc: An interactive speaking workshop for intermediate and advanced learners. Focus on fluency, clarity, and natural language use through guided discussions and practical conversation activities.

corporate.name: Corporate English
corporate.desc: AJ Language School offers customized English training for companies, designed to improve employees' communication in professional environments. Our program focuses on practical workplace skills such as meetings, emails, presentations, and industry-specific language across fields like Banking, IT, Engineering, and Medical. Classes are delivered in flexible group formats, with progress tracking and certification included to ensure measurable results.

included.title: What's Included
included.subtitle: Everything you need for a complete learning experience
included.placementDesc: 20-minute speaking interview to determine your level
included.testsDesc: Regular assessments to track your progress
included.progressDesc: Monthly student progress reports and personalized feedback
included.corporateDesc: Monthly HR reports, attendance tracking, and progress notes
included.certificateDesc: Certificate provided upon completion of program

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your journey to English fluency in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Complete a 20-minute speaking interview so we can understand your current level.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Get placed in the right level with a small group of up to 10 students.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Join live sessions from anywhere in the world.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive monthly tests, feedback reports, and watch your skills grow.

teacher.title: Meet Your Teacher
teacher.name: Angela
teacher.quote: I believe every student has a voice worth sharing with the world. My goal is to help you find yours — in English.
teacher.bio1: Angela is an experienced multilingual educator and international business professional who has built her career through studying, living, and working in diverse cultural environments around the world. Her global journey has allowed her to develop a deep understanding of language acquisition, cross-cultural communication, and the real challenges students face when learning English.
teacher.bio2: Fluent in five languages, Angela brings a unique and empathetic teaching approach that goes beyond grammar and vocabulary. She creates a supportive, motivating, and results-driven environment where students feel confident, understood, and empowered to grow.
teacher.bio3: Angela has an academic background in English Language studies, Tourism Management, and International Business Management, which allows her to offer specialized training tailored to real-world needs.
teacher.bio4: Through AJ Language School, students receive not only high-quality academic instruction but also personalized guidance, mindset support, and practical tools to succeed in international environments. Angela's mission is to help students unlock global opportunities, build confidence, and communicate effectively in English — no matter where they are starting from.

contact.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch and take the first step toward English fluency
contact.classesDesc: Learn from anywhere in the world

footer.tagline: English that takes your voice beyond borders
